svg.title: Resume Checker SDLC Representation
svg.desc: An SDLC style diagram showing how the Talent IQ Resume Checker module fits into the software development life cycle.
svg.text: Software development life cycle view of the AI-powered resume review subsystem
Need a secure tool that compares a resume to a target role and job description, surfaces gaps honestly, and suggests stronger presentation without inventing claims.
Design DOCX-only upload, protected API route, extraction and normalization pipeline, preview score stage, streamed AI output, and downloadable PDF feedback.
React page logic, file validation, streamed request handling, PDF builder, Express routes, Multer upload middleware, Mammoth extraction, scoring helpers, and resume-mode AI prompting.
Check DOCX restriction, file-size handling, readable text extraction, job-description requirement, preview scoring, streamed review completion, stop control, and PDF download output.
Add saved review history, resume version comparison, richer formatting analysis, recruiter scorecards, and benchmark-based evaluation with real test data.
